positive: Minimalist and stylized portrait of a wise, futuristic owl perched on a geometric moon crescent. The owl has intricate feather detail and large, luminous amber eyes. The background is a stylized, deep cosmic nebula gradient in sapphire blue, lavender, and soft gold, with floating geometric constellations and abstract wisps of stardust. Clean silhouette design, central composition, strong dramatic backlighting that emphasizes feather texture and form. Vector illustration style mixed with photorealistic ethereal glow, highly symmetrical, designed for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, lowres, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, fuzzy, amateur, disfigured, poorly rendered, asymmetrical
